title: centaurea nigra subsp. pratensis
intro: Centaurea nigra subsp. pratensis, also known as knapweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Centaurea nigra subsp. pratensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, or used as a topical application to reap its medicinal benefits.
